result: The R script has been successfully executed to clean and harmonize the NS-SEC occupational class variables from the survey datasets. The cleaned data containing only the required variables (NSID, nssec17, nssec18, nssec19, nssec20, nssec25, nssec32) has been saved to 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv'. The output file includes properly processed occupational class variables with harmonized missing value codes and collapsed fractional categories as specified in the requirements.
